sizing_rule.note: Position size = 100 / optimal_f (derived from Z(T, U-Y) mathematical expectation). Example: optimal_f of 1.9 yields 1 unit per $52.63 equity. Formula allows dynamic sizing based on expectation calculation.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by dividing 100 by the optimal f value, which represents the fraction of account equity to risk per trade based on mathematical expectation of the underlying.
